---
title: "Connectors are agents, not adapters"
description: "Extraction is interpretive work, so a connector is an agent that wraps a source, declares a capability, and files provenance; a small ontology per source is what lets it reason instead of guess."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents, connectors]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** Extraction is interpretive work, so a connector is an agent that wraps a source, declares a capability, and files provenance; a small ontology per source is what lets it reason instead of guess.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Connector-Agents.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
